fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Florida Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT) Application — Requirements & Fees (2026)
seo.description: Apply for a Florida Pharmacy Technician credential. Learn about the requirements, PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam, and state fees.
seo.keywords: Florida pharmacy technician license, Pharmacy technician license by state, CPhT license requirements, pharmacy tech registration, state board of pharmacy, pharmacy tech license cost

board.name: Florida Board of Pharmacy
board.parent_dept: Florida Department of Health, Board of Medicine

license_types.title: Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacy technician in Florida.

steps.title: Complete Education Requirements
steps.description: Complete a ASHP-accredited pharmacy technician program or equivalent training and any required clinical practicum or fieldwork.

steps.title: Pass the PTCB
steps.description: Successfully pass the required PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

steps.title: Submit Application and Fees
steps.description: Complete the state application, undergo a background check if required, and submit the necessary licensing fees.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the PTCB. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Florida pharmacy technician license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.
